message:
feat(tests): add stream/sink integration test suite (E.3, asupersync-3mmh1)

28 integration tests covering stream→sink pipelines:
- Basic forward() to channels
- Combinator chains (filter, map, skip, take, chain, enumerate) → forward
- E.2 combinators (scan, peekable, throttle, debounce) in pipeline contexts
- SinkStream::send and send_all with combinator chains
- ReceiverStream → combinator → forward round-trips
- Error propagation through try_collect/try_fold/try_for_each
- Multi-stage pipelines (3-stage scan→filter→map through channels)
- Edge cases (single item, large stream, disconnected receiver)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
